compiled_state.title: Document plugins/dso/tests/ file disposition in ticket comment
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Pre-migration inventory step. Before any files are moved in Task 3, write a ticket comment on 666f-b07d documenting each file in plugins/dso/tests/ with its disposition. This satisfies Done Definition #1.

## File inventory
- plugins/dso/tests/test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh → disposition: migrate-to-tests (→ tests/skills/ — skill test for sprint SKILL.md step 10 behavior; currently passes)

## Implementation
Run:
.claude/scripts/dso ticket comment 666f-b07d "Pre-migration inventory: plugins/dso/tests/
- test-sprint-skill-step10-no-merge-to-main.sh: migrate-to-tests (→ tests/skills/ — skill test for sprint SKILL.md step 10 behavior)"

## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Unit Test Exemption
Unit test exemption criterion 3: modifies only static assets — a ticket comment is a non-executable artifact with no conditional logic or branching.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Ticket 666f-b07d has a comment with 'migrate-to-tests' label for the test file
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 666f-b07d | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(0 if any('migrate-to-tests' in c['body'] for c in d['comments']) else 1)"
